title: Publication 28 — 211 Standardized Delivery Address Line and Last Line

chunks.heading: Standardized Delivery Address Line and Last Line
chunks.text: The Delivery Address Line and the Last Line of addresses output to the mailpiece should be complete, standardized, and validated with the ZIP+4 file and City State files, respectively. A complete address is one that has all the address elements necessary to allow an exact match with the current Postal Service ZIP+4 and City State files to provide the most current, correct, and deliverable ZIP+4 Code available. A standardized address is one that includes all required address elements and that uses the Postal Service standard abbreviations (as shown in this publication or in the current Postal Service ZIP+4 file).
